title: Item On Chest
description: Displays the most common itemstack in a chest.
body:
When a chest is opened the game saves the most occurring item in the inventory and displays it above or in front of the chest!



This mod is purely Client-Side and does not send or receive any packets to/from the server.![example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d4928f1c94a14befcc69e930218221b93eff35da.png)
